title: Twilio Call
description: Represents a voice call made to or from a Twilio account, including call status, duration, pricing, and related metadata.

account_sid.description: SID of the Twilio account that created the call

parent_call_sid.description: SID of the parent call if this is a child call leg

to.description: Phone number, SIP URI, or client identifier that received the call

to_formatted.description: Formatted version of the To number

from.description: Phone number or client identifier that initiated the call

from_formatted.description: Formatted version of the From number

phone_number_sid.description: SID of the Twilio phone number used

price.description: Price of the call in the account currency

duration.description: Duration of the call in seconds

start_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the call started

end_time.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the call ended

answered_by.description: Whether the call was answered by a human or machine

forwarded_from.description: Number that forwarded the inbound call

queue_time.description: Time the call spent in queue in milliseconds

trunk_sid.description: SID of the SIP trunk used for the call

date_created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the resource was created

date_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the resource was last updated

uri.description: Relative URI for this call resource
